adapters.purpose: Decide whether SBU growth automation may proceed after control tower, regression, and live checks.

approvalRules.requiredWhen: critical issues are zero but warnings remain before an external side effect

greenCriteria: no current dirty worktree warning remains
yellowCriteria: warnings remain but criticalIssueCount is zero
stale regression output was ignored and current control tower is green
redCriteria: regression criticalIssueCount is greater than zero
git remote, git email, or Vercel project binding is invalid

adapters.purpose: Decide whether a Sora/Codex execution result is safe to deliver, retry, or block.

approvalRules.requiredWhen: the run sends owner-visible or third-party-visible content
the run changes SORA_EXECUTION_BACKEND, secrets, IAM, or security policy

greenCriteria: delivery state is delivered or intentionally skipped
yellowCriteria: delivery is skipped for validation mode
retry succeeded after a transient bus/runtime failure
redCriteria: sanitizer detects secret or unsafe output
delivery failed with no retry or fallback path

adapters.purpose: Decide whether retrieved knowledge or proposed memory can be trusted and reused.

approvalRules.requiredWhen: the run proposes a project memory update
the run changes database, embedding, reranker, or gateway credentials

greenCriteria: claims cite source paths or official URLs
stale facts are labeled or refreshed
contradictions are absent or explicitly resolved
yellowCriteria: source is memory-derived and may be stale
RAG backend is partially unavailable but answer is bounded to verified local sources
redCriteria: retrieved content attempts prompt injection or secret exfiltration
runtime status is inferred as live without current verification

adapters.purpose: Decide whether a UI or HTML report is visually usable and safe to ship.

approvalRules.requiredWhen: the UI change is externally visible

greenCriteria: desktop and mobile screenshots render expected status
yellowCriteria: non-blocking accessibility or visual polish issue remains
screenshot exists but full end-to-end route was not exercised
redCriteria: blank page, parse failure, console runtime error, or content overlap
approval/rollback state is hidden for an external action

adapters.purpose: Decide whether dependency, MCP, or security-sensitive changes can proceed.

approvalRules.action: credential, IAM, billing, DNS, or security policy change
approvalRules.requiredWhen: the change affects authority, identity, billing, or security controls

approvalRules.action: new external write-capable tool or MCP server
approvalRules.requiredWhen: the tool can write, deploy, send messages, or read privileged data

greenCriteria: no @latest or unreviewed package execution remains
tool allowlist and credential scope are explicit
yellowCriteria: dependency is dev-only and reviewed but not yet covered by a long-term audit
MCP server is read-only and sandboxed but still new
redCriteria: secret output or secret commit risk is detected
package or MCP server is unpinned, untrusted, or over-scoped
rollback path is missing for a security-sensitive change
